_doc: TGIF robustness for the default r016/epoch_0004.pt, SPLIT into condition-groups so each orchestrate cell is a fresh process (the single 17-condition run OOM-killed host RAM at ~100k accumulated records). Each cell runs ~3-4 conditions via --conditions over the full TGIF set (500/cell). 5 cells; run group_a/c/e on one GPU and group_b/d on the other (or any split). Per-cell eval_summary.json holds that group's per-condition metrics; concatenate the 5 for the full robustness table. IMD robustness already completed in the original run (only 212 val items, no OOM). Checkpoint: /media/ssd/runs/ablation/lora_rank_sweep/r016/epoch_0004.pt.
